ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 = male; 0 = female) */,
  "chest_pain_type" INTEGER /* Type of chest pain (1-4) */,
  "rest_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure in mm Hg */,
  "serum_cholesterol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol in mg/dl */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar (> 120 mg/dl, 1 = true; 0 = false) */,
  "re_electrocardiographic" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiographic results (0-2) */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exercise_induced" INTEGER /* Exercise induced angina (1 = yes; 0 = no) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* Oldpeak = ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "slope" INTEGER /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment (1-3) */,
  "major_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thal" INTEGER /* Thalassemia (1 = normal; 2 = fixed defect; 3 = reversable defect) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Heart disease diagnosis (0 = absence; 1 = presence) */,
  "height" REAL /* Patient height in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Patient weight in kg */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (current, former, never) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease (yes/no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Medical specialization of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient attending the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor conducting the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the lab test conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "lab_technician" TEXT /* Name of the lab technician who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient prescribed the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was discontinued */,
  "prescribing_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the emergency contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the insurance */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage provided */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of insurance expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record is accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the health event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Description of the health event (e.g., hospitalization, diagnosis) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the health event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the health event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient experiencing the symptom */,
  "symptom" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "allergy" TEXT /* Description of the allergy */,
  "allergy_date" TEXT /* Date when the allergy was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
